specific_question: According to July 2024 customer survey results, what percentage of electric vehicle buyers preferred transparent, no-haggle pricing?
answer: A July 2024 market research report by Elexion Automotive indicated that 68% of potential electric vehicle buyers preferred transparent and haggle-free pricing.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
